Item.description: A purchased item; either a pricing option or a retail product.

SalesNotes.description: Sales Notes for the Product Purcahsed
SalesNotes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

DiscountAmount.description: The amount of the discount applied to the item.

VisitIds.description: The IDs of the booked classes, enrollments, or courses that were reconciled by this cart item. This list is only returned if a valid visit ID was passed in the request’s `VisitIds` list.

Appointments.description: The IDs of the appointments that were reconciled by this cart item. This list is only returned if a valid appointment ID was passed in the request’s `AppointmentIds` list.

Id.description: The item’s ID in the current cart.

Quantity.description: The quantity of the item being purchased.
